Our Difference
Why Choose CR Industries

We combine institutional-grade technology with a human-first approach — giving traders of every level the tools to succeed in global markets.

$2.4B
Volume Traded
18K+
Active Clients
99.7%
Platform Uptime
0.0
Min Spread (pips)
🏦

Tier-1 Liquidity

Direct access to liquidity from the world's largest banks and financial institutions. Consistently the best bid/ask spreads available in the market.

🔐

Segregated Funds

Your deposits are held in fully segregated client accounts at top-tier banking institutions — completely separate from company operating funds.

⚡

1ms Execution

Co-located servers in LD4, NY4 and TY3 data centres deliver sub-millisecond order routing with zero requotes on standard account types.

🎯

No Dealing Desk

Pure ECN/STP execution. We never take the other side of your trades. Your profit is never our loss — true alignment of interests.

📱

Multi-Platform

Trade seamlessly on MetaTrader 5, our web trader, and iOS/Android mobile apps. Your account syncs across all devices in real time.

🎓

Free Education

Unlimited access to live webinars, video courses, daily market analysis, and a dedicated mentorship program for all account holders.

🌍

Global Reach

Operating across 50+ countries with multi-currency accounts, local payment methods, and 24/5 multilingual support in 12 languages.

💬

24/5 Support

Dedicated account managers and live chat support available around the clock during trading hours. Average response time under 2 minutes.

📊

Advanced Analytics

Built-in trading analytics, performance reporting, risk management tools, and economic calendar integration directly in your dashboard.

Introducing Broker Program

How It Works
3 Simple Steps
to Earning
01

Register Online

Complete our simple IB application. Most applications are approved within 24 hours with a dedicated account manager assigned.

02

Get Your Materials

Receive your unique tracking links, personalised landing pages, banners, and full marketing toolkit in multiple languages.

03

Earn Commissions

Earn rebates automatically on every trade your referred clients place. Withdraw daily, weekly or monthly — your choice.

04

Build Your Network

Recruit sub-IBs and earn an additional 30% override on all their commissions — unlimited earning depth.

Community Benefits
What You Get
📡

Daily Signals

Professional trade signals with entry, stop-loss, and take-profit levels delivered to your Telegram/Discord every trading day.

📹

Live Webinars

Weekly live trading sessions and market analysis with our senior traders. All sessions recorded for on-demand replay.

🏆

Trading Contests

Monthly demo and live trading competitions with real cash prizes, funded account rewards, and leaderboard recognition.

🤝

Peer Mentoring

Connect directly with experienced traders in our community. Get feedback on your trade setups, strategies, and risk management.

📰

Market News

Real-time breaking news, economic calendar updates, and expert commentary pushed directly to your preferred channel.

🎁

Exclusive Bonuses

Community members get first access to deposit bonuses, cashback promotions, and loyalty rewards not available elsewhere.
